title: Projektassistent (m/w/d) Bereich Privatkunden und öffentliche Instituationen
required_skills: Independent, structured, and responsible work style
bonus_skills: Experience with building services / trade-specific software
matched_skills: MS Office / Excel — extensively used across HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd, IPC Marketing for dashboards and reporting
Organizational ability — PMO-level coordination of 6 workstreams at HSBC
Communication skills — stakeholder management and C-suite reporting
Report creation — management reports, project analyses, and performance reports across all roles
Data preparation and statistics — burn-rate dashboards and KPI reporting
missing_skills: Commercial apprenticeship (Ausbildung) qualification — Boru holds university master's degrees
German language at required operational level (B1 only)
core_responsibilities: Independent invoice review and creation within project execution
Commercial support for division management in day-to-day business
Support controlling, calculation, and evaluation tasks
Telephone and written communication with clients and engineering offices
Maintain project data in ERP system
Create documents, reports, analyses, and statistics independently
recommended_emphasis: HSBC burn-rate dashboards and project reporting as evidence of financial tracking
MS Excel and report creation skills demonstrated across all roles
Stakeholder communication skills for client-facing requirements
Organizational coordination experience from PMO role
summary: Scoring 21.4, this role is a poor match for Boru Lai. The Projektassistent role at Hieber is a hands-on operational position in a small building services company, primarily requiring a commercial vocational qualification, ERP system knowledge, and German-language client communication — skills and qualifications not aligned with Boru's profile. Boru is significantly overqualified in PMO governance and underqualified in German language and trade-specific tools. Application is not recommended.
